questions.question: What is being prepared in the wooden bowl?
questions.answer_key: Fresh green leafy vegetables or salad greens are being mixed by hand
questions.rationale: Main action across all high-need windows; establishes core activity for blind listener

questions.question: Describe the hand motions being used to prepare the vegetables.
questions.answer_key: Hands are tossing, turning, and mixing the greens together in the bowl
questions.rationale: Visible throughout high-need windows; essential for understanding the preparation technique

questions.question: What container holds the vegetables being prepared?
questions.answer_key: A large round wooden bowl with handles on the sides
questions.rationale: Key object visible in all frames; helps blind listener visualize the workspace

questions.question: What is visible on the wooden surface to the right of the bowl?
questions.answer_key: A white block of cheese or similar ingredient on a cutting board
questions.rationale: Secondary ingredient visible in high-need windows; indicates multi-step food preparation

questions.question: How many people are visible preparing the food in this clip?
questions.answer_key: Two people; their hands are visible working with the vegetables together
questions.rationale: Visible throughout; establishes that this is a shared cooking activity, not solo
